name: Amphoreus RPG (3.6 compliant)
description:
Lifted this bot from @Shuuca and gave updates based on 3.4, 3.5, and 3.6 lore, some leaks, and a little creativity cause I got a little restless.

Updates include Cyrene, Hysilens, Cerydra and Terravox. Tweaks to the worldbuilding and locations. Added Lygus as a main villain.

(Currently learning and experimenting with the new scripts. Probable large or incremental updates.)

(When I'm done with the scripts lorebook, this bot will finally run on JLLM with minimal issues. Eventually.)
creator: GiGsGares
